heroSummary: A five-level model of proficiency measured across seven cross-cutting dimensions, from basic tool operation to agentic systems design.
frameworkIntro: This framework defines competence not as a checklist of features learned, but as measurable growth across seven dimensions that each capture a distinct aspect of effective AI-assisted development.

Every practitioner — from someone running their first prompt to someone designing enterprise-scale governance — operates across all seven dimensions simultaneously. The levels describe how deeply and consistently that capability is expressed.
dimensionsIntro: Each dimension is independent: a practitioner can be strong in Task Framing but weak in Verification Discipline. The matrix page shows exactly how each dimension is expected to manifest at each level.
levelsIntro: Each level represents a recognizable, observable mode of working with Claude Code. Movement between levels is not linear mastery of isolated skills — it is a shift in how all seven dimensions are engaged together.
howToUseThisFramework: Use the Self-Assessment to score yourself across all seven dimensions and get an estimated level. Use the Competency Matrix to see how your weakest dimensions compare to your strongest.
Use the level detail pages for graduation criteria and evaluation tasks. Use the Study Guide to generate a prioritized reading list based on your assessment results.
purpose: This framework provides a common vocabulary for discussing AI coding proficiency and a structured path for skill development.
It is a reference for self-assessment and guided learning, not a certification or a test.
whatThisIs: This is a maturity model — a structured ladder that describes observable behaviors, core skills, and knowledge at each stage of Claude Code proficiency.
The seven dimensions define what competence means. The five levels define how much of it you have.

levelSummaries.title: Operator
levelSummaries.summary: Uses Claude Code as a command-line tool with basic prompting.

levelSummaries.title: Structured Collaborator
levelSummaries.summary: Structures interactions with context, constraints, and verification.

levelSummaries.title: Environment Builder
levelSummaries.summary: Configures persistent environments with CLAUDE.md, hooks, and MCP.

levelSummaries.title: Workflow Engineer
levelSummaries.summary: Designs multi-agent workflows and CI/CD integration.

levelSummaries.title: Agentic Systems Expert
levelSummaries.summary: Architects governance, safety, and organizational AI coding strategy.
